message:
Add Redis MULTI/EXEC transactions and Pub/Sub connection implementation

Implement the full Redis transaction (MULTI/EXEC/DISCARD) lifecycle:
- Transaction struct wraps a dedicated pooled connection
- cmd()/cmd_bytes() queue commands, validating QUEUED responses
- exec() sends EXEC and returns array of per-command results
- discard() sends DISCARD to abort; also triggered on drop if uncommitted
- Proper connection cleanup on all error paths (discard + release)

Implement RedisPubSub dedicated connection for Pub/Sub:
- connect() opens an unpooled TCP connection with optional TLS and auth
- subscribe()/unsubscribe() for channel-based subscriptions
- psubscribe()/punsubscribe() for pattern-based subscriptions
- recv() reads and parses push messages (message, pmessage,
  subscribe/unsubscribe acks, pong)
- ping() for connection health checks
- close() shuts down the connection
- All methods use the Cx context for cancel-safety

Add PubSub message parsing that correctly handles both 3-element
(subscribe/message) and 4-element (pmessage/psubscribe) RESP arrays.
Validate frame types and return typed PubSubEvent variants.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
